name: Almond-Date Granola Bars
recipeInstructions:
Filling: Heat dates, coconut, and half-and-half in a saucepan over medium heat. Stir often until the mixture boils and thickens—about 15 minutes—and remove from heat. Stir in almond extract and set aside to cool.
Crust: Mix together oats, flour, sugar, baking soda, and cinnamon in a medium bowl. Blend well. Pour melted butter over all and stir until well moistened. Press about 3 cups of granola mixture into the bottom of an 8-inch square baking pan and chill for 30 minutes to harden.
To bake: Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Spread cooled filling over the granola base. Sprinkle remaining granola mixture over filling. Sprinkle toasted almonds over all. Bake for 30 minutes or until the top is slightly browned and crisp. Cool to room temperature and cut into bars.
